_comment: Seed signals for the Niche Selection Loop (Phase 0). Scores are 0-100. Replace these placeholder signals with real demand/CPC/competitor data from your validation sprint; the loop re-scores from whatever is here.

candidates.name: Creator content engine
candidates.job: Turns one topic/URL into a month of platform-native posts, scripts, thumbnails

candidates.name: Niche SEO/content writer
candidates.job: Bulk on-brand long-form + programmatic SEO for SMBs/agencies

candidates.name: Sales/outbound copilot
candidates.job: Researches prospects + drafts personalised outreach at scale

candidates.name: Vertical pro-GPT (trades/tutors/realtors)
candidates.job: Daily workflow tool for a specific profession
